stephen-bates.name: Stephen Bates

sessions.title: Swim Speed Endurance | 3 x (2 x 50 PB PD, 4 x 25/25) |

stephen-bates.coach_summary: Strong Tuesday hill session — 4x (5x30s) at pace, 134 TSS banked and TSB up to -9.4, best form of the block so far. CTL climbed to 80.7 (+1.3 vs yesterday) showing the deload absorbed well. Monday opened easy with a recovery swim plus short run. Ahead: quality swim Wednesday (speed endurance PB/PD set), full day off Friday, easy aerobic run Saturday. Body is handling the load — green light to keep building.

2026-04-06.title: Torque Interval low rpm + Metabolic | 3x 10min | ftp
2026-04-06.description: Please follow the workout details, with prescribed zones (and power targets if required) outlined below.

2026-04-06.title: Swim | 1000 + 6 x 250 | High Aerobic Set 2.1
2026-04-06.description:
No warm up Race Day simulation

Main Set:
--------------------
1000 straight swim with building effort (200 @ Int End, 300 @ LT2, 50 recovery, 300 @Int End, 50 easy) rest 2 min

6 x 250 (50 @Fast, 100 @ Steady, 50 @Fast, 50 easy) rest 20's after each 250

All even sets with any equipment

Cool down:
---------------------
100 easy

2026-04-13.title: Swim | Recovery | Z2
2026-04-13.description:
4x 100m (75 free / 25 backstroke) rest 20's
-------------------------------------------------
Main set:
8x 50m easy rest 15's
400m pb & pd easy rest 30's
6x 50m easy rest 15's
300m pb & pd easy rest 30's
4x 50m easy rest 15's
200m pb & pd easy rest 30's
-----------------------------------------------
500m cool down

2026-04-13.title: Swim Speed Endurance | 3 x (2 x 50 PB PD, 4 x 25/25) |
Recovery: Full Day Off (All Levels)
2026-04-13.description:
SESSION:
Full day off from any training. Can include some light stretching and mobility work today if you wish.

PURPOSE:
To allow an opportunity for your body to recover and adapt to recent training, and to ensure you're feeling fresh for other key training sessions in the week.

2026-04-13.title: Run | 40min Easy - choice run | HR
2026-04-13.description: Just nice and easy, getting into a nice rhythm.

2026-04-20.title: Run |30-40min Easy | Pace
2026-04-20.description: Just nice and easy, getting into a nice rhythm.

2026-04-20.title: Easy riding 90min | HR
2026-04-20.description:
Please follow the workout details, with prescribed zones (and power targets if required) outlined below.

Nice and easy - conversational pace

2026-04-20.title: Session
2026-04-20.description:
Warm Up:
8x 25 (fast every 4th 25)
6x 25 (fast every 3rd 25)
4x 25 (fast every 2nd 25)
2x 25 (fast, fast)

Main Set:
20x 50m (Fast, Easy)
1x 400m pads + pb - all out effort

Cool Down:
2x 25 (fast, fast)
4x 25 (fast every 2nd 25)
6x 25 (fast every 3rd 25)
8x 25 (fast every 4th 25)

2026-04-20.title: 50min Easy - choice run
2026-04-20.description: Just nice and easy, getting into a nice rhythm.

2026-04-20.title: Swim | 40x 50m | Steady State
2026-04-20.description:
Warm Up:
8x 25 (fast every 4th 25)
6x 25 (fast every 3rd 25)
4x 25 (fast every 2nd 25)
2x 25 (fast, fast)

Main Set:
40x 50m steady fast + pb + pads
Rest 10s

Cool Down:
200m

2026-04-20.title: Endurance 3hr
2026-04-20.description:
Bike:
3 hours easy – conversational pace.
Do not go too hard in this; the key is time in the saddle.

2026-04-27.title: 20x 1min ON/OFF repeats | FTP
2026-04-27.description:
Please follow the workout details, with prescribed zones (and power targets if required) outlined below.

WU: 15min easy

MS: 20x 1min *Strong in aero position /
1 min easy recovery down hill (or spin indoor)
*Effort – 55-60 RPM

CD: 15min

2026-04-27.title: 4x 10min Torque low RPM + Sprints
2026-04-27.description: Please follow the workout details, with prescribed zones (and power targets if required) outlined below.
